name: Pivot Technology Solutions Inc.
description: Pivot Technology Solutions Inc. was a Canadian-based information technology services and solutions provider that specialized in system integration and enterprise infrastructure management. The company focused on a strategy of acquiring and integrating various technology solution providers to offer comprehensive services, including systems, storage, security, networking, and compliance solutions to businesses, government agencies, educational institutions, and healthcare organizations across North America. It operated through several portfolio entities and was publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PTG until its acquisition and subsequent delisting.
